title: clockiPy hardening + productivity-coach evolution
north_star: Best-in-class personal time-analytics CLI; evolve into a productivity coach that surfaces drift and patterns.

phases.name: foundation: pyproject + dev extras + plan + cleanup
critical bugs: TZ-local recurring grouping; HTTP timeout/retry/pagination/error surfacing
UX/observability: logging + --verbose/--quiet; drop markdown dep
phases.notes: rich-table swap deferred to avoid breaking md export parity

phases.name: tests: property + smoke + CI workflow
phases.notes: ruff scope narrowed to E/F/W/I; UP/SIM/B deferred

phases.name: prompt reflection: folded learnings into P9 skill
docs restructure: docs/* (architecture, credentials, cache, goals-and-digest, planned-vs-measured, cli-reference, development, troubleshooting) + README in 60s-onboarding style
skill upgrade: embed Phase 8 Documentation blueprint inline in project-improvement SKILL (machine-agnostic, no abs paths, no external links)

decisions.persistence: SQLite under $XDG_CACHE_HOME, per-(workspace,user) DB, schema-version rebuild
decisions.cache_refresh: fresh if <1h AND range covered, else refetch+merge; --refresh forces, --no-cache disables
decisions.anomaly_detection: |Δ|>25% vs 4w median, gated on ≥2 prior weeks of cached data

deliverables.clockipy: 117 tests green, 83% coverage, ruff clean, CI workflow committed; README + docs/ restructured for <60s onboarding
reusable: cursor-config/.agents/skills/project-improvement/SKILL.md (Phase 8 inline blueprint + verification gates + portability rules)
